scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build src/spikes/svg-clock --outDir ../../../dist/spikes/svg-clock --emptyOutDir && vite build src/product-static-clock --outDir ../../dist/product-static-clock --emptyOutDir && vite build src/live-clock --outDir ../../dist/live-clock --emptyOutDir
